title: <![CDATA[The Global Story: How Pakistan became the peacemaker]]>
passage: Today’s reading brings together several major developments from recent international headlines. First, <![CDATA[Talks are expected between the US and Iran in Islamabad.]]> This event reflects broader global trends. Overall, these developments show how interconnected global events are.
